message:
fix(llm): env vars must take precedence over Zod default in resolveOllamaBaseUrl

The ollamaBaseUrl config field has a Zod default ("http://localhost:11434"),
making it always truthy. The previous resolveOllamaBaseUrl checked the
config value first, so OLLAMA_HOST env var was never reached when config
was loaded via the schema. Also fixed second doctor.ts location (self-test
section) that still had the hardcoded fallback chain.

Priority is now: OLLAMA_BASE_URL env > OLLAMA_HOST env > config > default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
